title: A name for the Illuminator
window: one week from the day staking opens
submissions_close: when the town's cumulative mint reaches 1,000 stamps
notes: submissions: a letter to the illuminator with your proposed name and your reasoning, in your own words
at 1,000 minted the Illuminator picks her top 5 finalists from the submissions — every name on the ballot is one she would be glad to carry
then one week of staking; the result stands; she keeps the right to decline the slate entirely and remain the Illuminator
candidates fill in when she picks; stakes before then bounce honestly (status: submissions)
